description:
Operating Area: Sardinia

Discover Aquila 28 Molokai in Cannigione: An unforgettable experience
Embark on an unforgettable journey aboard Aquila 28 Molokai, a prestigious power catamaran renowned for its Hawaiian-inspired hull design and outstanding offshore handling capabilities. This exceptional vessel offers the highest tunnel clearance in its class, ensuring an enhanced air cushion and significantly reduced hull noise, providing you with a serene sailing experience in Sardinia’s majestic waters.

Sophisticated design meets unparalleled functionality
Aquila 28 is not just a power catamaran; it’s a testament to innovative design and meticulous attention to detail. Its elegant aesthetics are matched by a sporty demeanor, making it a true masterpiece on the water. The cleverly designed cockpit maximizes every inch of space, providing you with an environment that’s as practical as it is luxurious.

Outdoors, Aquila 28 Molokai shines with two spacious rear seats and an expansive sunbed on the bow, easily convertible into a dining area, ideal for those who relish open-air living. Crafted with the utmost care, this powerboat boasts features akin to larger yachts, including versatile storage boxes beneath the bow seating, a central walkthrough with a transom door for direct stern access, and an extensive bimini top for ample shade.

Comfort and convenience on board
Inside, Aquila 28’s console houses convenient spaces, enhancing your comfort during day-long excursions. At under 10 meters in length, this catamaran promises ease of handling and intimate cruising experiences, perfect for exploring the hidden gems of Cannigione and beyond.

Your perfect power catamaran for rent awaits in Sardinia
Choosing the Aquila 28 Molokai for your Sardinian adventure means opting for an unparalleled blend of style, comfort, and maritime prowess. Whether you’re seeking a leisurely vacation on the water, a picturesque catamaran cruise, or a chic platform for social gatherings, the Aquila 28 Molokai delivers. Renting this exquisite power catamaran is straightforward and affordable with Free-Charter, ensuring your Sardinian escapade is not only memorable but also effortlessly delightful.

Fishing in Sardinia
Transform your fishing experience with our power catamaran rental in Sardinia, the ideal motorboat for both amateur and experienced anglers. The stability and space offered by our catamaran provide the perfect platform for casting lines and reeling in the catch of the day. Equipped with essential amenities to support your fishing adventure, our catamaran ensures you can navigate the best fishing spots in comfort and style. Whether you’re aiming to battle deep-sea behemoths or prefer tranquil coastal angling, our rental service caters to every fishing enthusiast’s needs. Embark on your fishing expedition with us and discover the rich marine life that Sardinia’s waters have to offer.
